title: Home - Frota Academy – Brazilian Jiujitsu, Mixed Martial Arts, Fitness
text: WORLD-CLASS TRAINING. AN INSPIRING COMMUNITY. Frota Academy, a leading martial arts destination in Europe, blends tradition and innovation within over 850 m² of state-of-the-art facilities in the heart of Zurich. With internationally renowned instructors and decades of experience, the academy has hosted legends like Roger Gracie, Marcus “Buchecha,” and Mackenzie Dern in exclusive seminars. Whether you’re a beginner seeking confidence and fitness or an experienced athlete pursuing performance and mastery, Frota Academy provides a technical, motivating, and welcoming environment — more than an academy, a global community united by a passion for martial arts. LEARN MORE ACADEMIES TRAIN AT ANY OF OUR SWISS LOCATIONS — book a free trial and experience why Frota Academy is one of the world’s top martial arts academies. Expert coaches with decades of experience BJJ, MMA, and multiple martial arts programs Group, private, and corporate classes Fully equipped fitness area Access to top trainers, nutritionists, and physiotherapists DISCOVER OUR PROGRAMS CHOOSE YOUR JOURNEY AND START TRAINING TODAY! — Programs designed for all levels, from beginners to advanced athletes, with group, private, and corporate class BRAZILIAN JIU-JITSU MMA MUAY THAI GRAPPLING WRESTLING BJJ FOR KIDS MMA FOR KIDS SELF-DEFENSE FOR WOMEN JJ FOR KIDS FOCUS, DISCIPLINE MOVEMENT AND FUN — Invest in your child’s growth and unlock their true potential! DISCOVER AUGUSTO FROTA “MY PURPOSE IS TO INSPIRE YOU TO REACH YOUR MARTIAL ARTS GOALS.” A 4th-degree BJJ black belt, Augusto founded Frota Academy in 2002, creating a welcoming environment for all levels. With experience in MMA and BJJ, he has grown the academy into a world-class reference, hosting classes and Seminars with renowned athletes. LEARN MORE A MEMBER OF A RENOWNED JIU-JITSU LINEAGE, UNITING LEGACY, DISCIPLINE, AND CONTINUOUS EVOLUTION. CLASS SCHEDULE CHECK THE SCHEDULE FOR ALL CLASSES AND PLAN YOUR ROUTINE. Rodrigo Nogueira Minotauro MMA Legend UFC /Pride Fighter "The best academy in the whole Switzerland.. a must attend if you live there or you are just passing through… Great instructors and great facilities… if you are in Master Frota’s hands.. you are in great hands. A must go academy for Brazilian jiu-jitsu" Renzo Gracie BJJ & MMA legend "The best place to be if you are in Zurich, great environment, great group and awesome place to learn martial arts. One of the most beautiful gym that I’ve seen." Marcus Almeida (Buchecha) 13x BJJ world & 2x ADCC champion, MMA fighter "We are from same place – Fortaleza (Brazil) – which makes us buddies first and foremost! I was his coach for a time… Augusto has always been a great person, besides a very dedicated athlete with an enormous potential!" Marcus Aurelio UFC/Pride veteran, BJJ black belt and author GET STARTED READY TO START TRAINING? If you are looking to start learning Martial Arts, to improve you actual skills or just want to get fit and be part of this amazing lifetyle, this is the place!
